earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: The ground heaves. Mines crack, quarries slide, and buildings shudder.

aftershock_cluster.name: Aftershock Cluster
aftershock_cluster.description: Repeated tremors prolong the quake's damage and keep nerves frayed.

tsunami.name: Tsunami
tsunami.description: A wall of water smashes the coast, wrecking fleets and shoreline works.

coastal_erosion.name: Coastal Erosion
coastal_erosion.description: The sea steadily eats the shoreline, nibbling harbors and fishing grounds.

sinkhole.name: Sinkhole
sinkhole.description: Ground collapses into a void, swallowing quarry faces and access roads.

mine_collapse.name: Mine Collapse
mine_collapse.description: Tunnels fail. Ore access is lost and miners flee the dark.

well_blowout.name: Well Blowout
well_blowout.description: A fuel well erupts uncontrolled, wasting reserves and poisoning ground.
